# terrible_community_general_influxdb_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `user_name` (String) Name of the user.

### Optional

- `admin` (Boolean) Whether the user should be in the admin role or not. Since version 2.8, the role is also updated.
- `grants` (String) Privileges to grant to this user. Takes a list of dicts containing the "database" and "privilege" keys. If this argument is not provided, the current grants are left alone. If an empty list is provided, all grants for the user are removed.
- `state` (String) State of the user.
- `user_password` (String) Password to be set for the user.
